title: Why Smart Money Traps Retail at Every Swing High (2026)
description: Retail traders lose at swing highs every single time. Is it bad luck — or are you being hunted? R2F Trading breaks down the Smart Money vs Retail debate so you never get trapped again. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups and order block analysis.
script: Stop. That swing high breakout? It's not a signal. It's a trap. Smart money just collected your stop. And 78% of retail traders never figure out why. Retail says: breakout above the high — that's momentum. Chase it. Enter long. It looks clean. It feels right. That's exactly what smart money needs you to think. Smart money says: buyside liquidity sitting above that high. Raid it. Sweep the stops. Reverse hard into an order block below. That swing high wasn't resistance — it was a hunting zone. Verdict: smart money wins because retail creates the fuel. Stop trading breakouts. Start trading the trap. The R2F Trading system shows you exactly how. Follow r2ftrading.com. New setups every day.
